subtitle: A personalized scratch-off full of tacos, plants, candles, and birthday nonsense.
bigline: Five official tickets. Zero cash. Maximum Sarah energy. Dave’s audit department has limited authority.
marqueeStart: ✨ 40TH BIRTHDAY SCRATCH LUCK LOADING FOR SARAH ✨
scratchHint: Scratch the silver coating to reveal the prize underneath.

welcome.title: Welcome, Sarah!
paragraphs: This is your official 40th birthday scratch-off from Jen.
You get 5 official tickets. No cash prizes. Just tacos, gardening glory, candle-related concerns, and family-approved laughter.
welcome.overrideLine: Important birthday rule: Dave may inspect the ticket, but Sarah still gets one more plant.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Guaranteed minimum birthday love: unlimited. Guaranteed minimum candles: probably also unlimited.

rules: Scratch until the ridiculous prize is revealed.
Anyone who says Sarah has enough plants must leave immediately.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Loot Bag
finale.note: Official game: Sarah keeps every funny prize she scratches. No cash prizes, just family jokes and 40th birthday glory.
finale.restartButton: 🔄 Play Again — Dave Demands a Recount

footer: Made with love for Sarah. No coins required. No actual lottery harmed. One more plant may have been purchased during gameplay.

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: Sarah says, "I just need one more plant."

claim.template:
🎟️ {recipientName} completed her {gameTitle}!

Official Birthday Loot: {lootSummary}

No cash prizes were awarded. Tacos, candles, plants, and family laughter reached jackpot levels.

{overridePerson} reviewed the results and was overruled by birthday law.

Happy 40th Birthday, {recipientName}!

prizes.title: One More Plant Permit
prizes.msg: Sarah officially wins permission to say, "I just need one more plant," even if everyone knows there are already several plants quietly taking over the house.

prizes.title: Emergency Taco Authorization
prizes.msg: This ticket authorizes Sarah to declare that tacos are not a meal choice, but a birthday lifestyle. Dave may ask questions, but tacos have already won.

prizes.title: Candle Acquisition Review
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the right to buy another candle because this one has a completely different scent, mood, season, vibe, and emotional purpose.

prizes.title: Garden Center Detour
prizes.msg: Sarah may casually stop at the garden center for "just a minute." Emma and Jack are advised that this phrase has never meant one minute.

prizes.title: 40th Birthday Queen
prizes.msg: Sarah is officially crowned Queen of Turning 40. Her royal duties include accepting compliments, eating tacos, and ignoring anyone who counts her candles.

prizes.title: Dave’s Budget Audit
prizes.msg: Dave reviewed the ticket and questioned the plant-and-candle department. The birthday committee has overruled him with love.

prizes.title: Cart Full of Totally Necessary Things
prizes.msg: Sarah wins one imaginary shopping cart containing tacos, a new plant, and a candle that smells like "fresh start with a hint of I deserve this."

prizes.title: Plant Whisperer Bonus
prizes.msg: Sarah has been certified as a Plant Whisperer. Any plant looking dramatic is simply requesting more love, better light, and possibly a friend.

prizes.title: Jen’s Sisterly Approval
prizes.msg: Jen officially confirms that Sarah is loved, celebrated, and absolutely not allowed to pretend turning 40 is not a big deal.

prizes.title: Home Decor Expansion Pack
prizes.msg: Sarah unlocks one imaginary home decor expansion pack. Warning: may contain candles, plants, cute pots, and one item Dave swears was not there yesterday.

prizes.title: Forty and Fabulous Clause
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the official right to be forty, fabulous, and slightly overstocked in the candle department. This clause cannot be appealed.

prizes.title: Real Jackpot
prizes.msg: No cash on this ticket. Sarah wins something better: love from Jen, Dave, Emma, Jack, and everyone who knows life is brighter with her in it.
